canonical_name: Soluble MHC Class I Chain-Related Protein A
step_rationale: Stress-induced immune activation marker; sMICA released during myocardial injury and inflammation.
mechanism: sMICA is an early marker of stress-induced immune activation and endothelial shedding during acute myocardial injury and plaque inflammation.

references.title: sMICA as novel and early predictors for acute myocardial infarction.
